success_surface: Cross-selling percentage calculation with precise number formatting and range styling
effective_behaviors: Programmatic sheet and cell structure inspection before manipulation
Dynamic range detection using data patterns rather than hardcoded indices
Binary conversion for threshold-based logical conditions
Edge case handling for diagonal/self-comparison cells
Precision-controlled number formatting with custom rules
Multi-stage verification (pre-save calculation check + post-write cell read)
Separate data population and style application phases
Output directory existence check before file operations
evidence: Agent inspected both 'Datensatz' and 'Analyse' sheet structures using load_workbook() before any modification
Customer rows detected by checking if cell value starts with 'Customer' string, not by assuming fixed row number
Product columns found via loop reading headers at row 3, avoiding hardcoded column references
Diagonal formula handled as special case (value always = 1) per task specification
format_percentage function implemented exact requirements: 9 decimal places, strip trailing zeros, no decimals when = 1
Printed sample calculated values before saving to validate logic
Applied background fill only after all cell values were populated in D5:K12 range
Created output directory with os.makedirs() before attempting wb.save()

memory_items.title: Pre-Execution Structure Discovery
memory_items.lesson: Always inspect sheet names and data layout programmatically before starting modifications
memory_items.generalization: Use workbook.sheetnames iteration and sample cell reads to discover table boundaries, headers, and data types before generating solution code.

memory_items.title: Pattern-Based Range Detection
memory_items.lesson: Detect dynamic ranges by searching for identifying patterns in cell values rather than assuming fixed positions
memory_items.generalization: When row/column counts are unknown, iterate through rows/cols looking for marker text or value thresholds to determine start/end boundaries.

memory_items.title: Conditional Value Normalization
memory_items.lesson: Convert continuous data to binary states based on business logic thresholds
memory_items.generalization: Apply >0/-1/other comparisons early in the pipeline to simplify downstream aggregation and comparison operations.

memory_items.title: Asymmetric Relationship Handling
memory_items.lesson: Identify and separately handle self-comparison or identity cases in pairwise calculations
memory_items.generalization: When computing cross-table metrics, detect diagonal/symmetric cases explicitly since they may require different formulas than off-diagonal pairs.

memory_items.title: Custom Number Formatting Rules
memory_items.lesson: Implement display-specific formatting that may differ from standard Excel number formats
memory_items.generalization: Create dedicated formatting functions that apply decimal precision, trailing zero removal, and special-case handling (e.g., integer when = 1) as strings before cell assignment.

memory_items.title: Two-Phase Data and Style Write
memory_items.lesson: Populate all data values before applying any visual formatting to avoid style conflicts
memory_items.generalization: Complete all cell.value assignments across the target range first, then use separate loops to apply fills/borders/fonts.

memory_items.title: Multi-Point Validation Logging
memory_items.lesson: Verify intermediate results during execution to catch logic errors before file corruption
memory_items.generalization: Print sample calculations mid-process and re-read saved values after writing to confirm both correctness and file integrity.

edits.content:
## 6. Trace-Derived Lessons
- **Structure Discovery First**: Inspect sheet names and table boundaries programmatically before coding any modifications; never assume fixed row/column positions.
- **Dynamic Range Detection**: Use pattern matching (e.g., "Customer", "Product" in cell values) to identify table start/end points rather than hardcoded indices.
- **Threshold-to-Binary Conversion**: Transform numeric comparisons (>0, <threshold) into 1/0 matrices early to simplify cross-product aggregation logic.
- **Identity Case Separation**: Handle diagonal or self-referential calculations as explicit exceptions in pairwise metric computations.
- **Precision Format Functions**: Create dedicated formatting functions for display requirements (decimal places, trailing zeros, special integer cases) applied as string values.
- **Data-Then-Style Phasing**: Complete all value assignments before applying fills, borders, or other visual formatting to prevent overwrite conflicts.
- **Validation Checkpoints**: Print sample intermediate results before saving and re-read final values after writing to verify both logic and file health.
